title: Triple Baka Totems
description:
Adds Triple Baka as Totems
(Totem of Miku, Totem of Teto, Totem of Neru)
body:
# **This pack adds all three bakas as totems.**
![Bakas](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8e7cce048dda878ae8718635739985663b86cc80.png)

## You can get one of the bakas by renaming a totem of undying in an anvil.
- Totem of Hatsune Miku ![Miku Totem](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/188e1a904b9f009c3b0005dfb94aa4c4fe939890.png)
>   ![Miku's look](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cb50dde84570d10a2b46b785e91a1fbc12f08109.png)
- Totem of Kasane Teto ![Tetotem](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0782daaf7432d9ca8e5fa6350c7b793d52777228.png)
> ![Teto's look](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e4c896c7b9d2fea9dde0f852d8eb73d5748b67ed.png)

- Totem of Akita Neru ![Neru Totem](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8678c4d8fecf5a5b73b983dfefe2de1bfff62cfb.png) 
> ![Neru's look](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e01e063b41cf3981722540243fd12ff966b58c24.png)
>

‎ 
‎
### Voilà, enjoy your bakas. They are ready to sacrifice themselves to save your life!
